changes: MAJOR FEATURE: Implemented real D20 dice rolling system with difficulty classes
MAJOR FEATURE: Added meaningful action consequences (success/failure affects game state)
MAJOR FEATURE: Eliminated auto-success - players can now fail actions
MAJOR FEATURE: Character progression tracking (social standing, investigation progress, HP/mana)
IMPROVEMENT: Location progression system (movement can change locations on success)
IMPROVEMENT: Risk/reward gameplay - every choice has mechanical weight
CLEANUP: Renamed files for clarity, removed unused/broken files
CLEANUP: Removed temporary files, old logs, improved .gitignore
breaking_changes: Actions now require dice rolls instead of auto-succeeding
File renames may affect imports in custom extensions
ui_changes: Dice roll results now displayed in debug output
Character stat changes shown (HP damage, social standing, etc.)
technical_changes: Added src/core/dice_system.py - Pure D20 randomness system
Added src/core/action_system.py - Action processing with consequences
Enhanced AI integration to use dice results for narrative
Fixed narrative enhancer to handle dictionary-based roll results

changes: MAJOR FIX: Game state management now works properly
MAJOR FIX: Location tracking fixed (no more 'unknown' location)
MAJOR FIX: Turn counting fixed (no more stuck at turn 0)
MAJOR FIX: Story progression implemented (prevents endless loops)
IMPROVEMENT: Choice display cleaned up (no more duplication)
IMPROVEMENT: Debug information now shows accurate game state
IMPROVEMENT: AI continuity enforcement active and working
ui_changes: Cleaner choice display in local runner
technical_changes: Fixed AIIntegrationLayer return format for local runner compatibility
Enhanced GameStateManager.get_current_state() to include progression data
Added advance_story_progress() method to prevent story stagnation
Improved location parsing with more natural language patterns

changes: Initial version with AI behavior validation system
Claude AI integration with constraint validation
